title: ULT Optiz
description: A boring optimization modpack  which don't only focus on increasing  your perfomance.
body:
# **Ult Optiz** **_[Ultimate Optimization Modpack]_**
**Ult Optiz** -Your low-end PC’s best friend. Made for smooth frames, zero fluff.

### Super lightweight modpack built to boost FPS and give the smoothest Minecraft experience ever, even on toasters.

**Struggling with lag? Constant stutters ruining your vibe? ULT OPTIZ is your savior. This modpack is tailored for ultra-low-end PCs and laptops — built from the ground up with optimization in mind, no useless bloat, just clean, buttery-smooth gameplay.**

**✨ Whether you're running on a school PC, ancient potato, or an iGPU setup — ULT OPTIZ turns that slideshow into a masterpiece.**

**🛠 Built with Sodium, Lithium, and every frame-saving trick in the book. Smart defaults, and pre-setup performance mods make this modpack plug-and-play — no tech skills needed.** 

### Performance 
Ult Optiz is performance based Modpack like Fabuosly Optimized, Ult Optiz uses modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. This  mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable FPS benefits on any device
